title: Knysna gymnast strikes gold at SA championships
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A young gymnast from Knysna,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young gymnast from Knysna, Euphre’za Witbooi, has made her hometown proud with an outstanding performance at the South African Gymnastics Championships held in Pretoria last week.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young gymnast from Knysna, Euphre’za Witbooi, has made her hometown proud with an outstanding performance at the South African Gymnastics Championships held in Pretoria last week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Witbooi, who trains at the Knysna Gymnastics Club under the guidance of Yvette Share, competed in Level 5 U12. She claimed gold in the vault event and placed seventh overall in her category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Just a month before nationals, she also made her mark at the Western Province Championships in Saldanha Bay, bringing home a gold and a silver medal.","html":"Just a month before nationals, she also made her mark at the Western Province Championships in Saldanha Bay, bringing home a gold and a silver medal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her journey to the national stage was made possible through a community effort which included generous donations and fundraising events.","html":"Her journey to the national stage was made possible through a community effort which included generous donations and fundraising events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in the next edition of Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in the next edition of Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna gymnast strikes gold at SA championships
